testcase.name: auto-resolves a single mandatory no-target triggered bag effect
keeps the triggered bag effect manual when action auto-resolution is explicitly disabled
preserves suppression through suspended action resolution
does not auto-resolve when multiple same-player mandatory no-target bag effects are pending
auto-resolves the last mandatory no-target bag effect after user resolves one of two
authoritative turn flow auto-resolves a single mandatory no-target triggered bag effect for the next resolver
keeps mandatory targeted triggers manual
keeps optional no-target triggers manual
resolving optional targeted bag effect creates a pending effect for target selection
accepts optional targeted bag resolutions when explicit targets are provided
allows declining optional targeted bag effects without providing targets
allows zero-target bag effects to defer selection until the pending choice
auto-resolves up-to bag effects when there are no legal candidates
rejects explicit invalid targets after a bag effect suspends into pending target selection
auto-resolves a remaining deterministic bag effect after a manual bag resolution
does not auto-resolve bag effects controlled by another player
does not queue bag effects when their trigger condition fails
returns the basic combat preview for character challenges
accounts for Challenger and Resist in the preview
includes existing damage when projecting lethal outcomes
treats location defenders as taking damage without striking back
clamps zero or reduced challenge damage to zero
returns null for illegal challenges
returns quest move with questable characters in play
does not return quest for fresh (drying) characters
returns challenge move with valid attackers
reuses cached challenge availability for repeated calls in the same state
reuses cached legal move ids when enumerateMoves is called after getAvailableMoves
reuses runtime enumeration results for repeated same-state calls
returns putCardIntoInkwell for inkable hand cards
excludes non-Evasive attacker when only Evasive defenders exist
includes Evasive attacker when Evasive defenders exist
returns passTurn when available
returns valid defenders for challenge
reuses cached challenge move options for the same attacker in the same state
filters out Evasive defenders for non-Evasive attackers
returns valid board-card targets for single-target playCard actions
excludes illegal Ward targets from single-target playCard shortcuts
falls back to no playCard shortcut targets when none are legal
does not expose playCard shortcut targets for player-target actions
does not expose playCard shortcut targets for multi-target actions
returns empty array for quest (no second selection)
does not grant lore bonus when strength is below threshold
grants lore bonus when strength meets threshold
does not grant lore bonus when strength is just below threshold
exports the current selectable engine strategies
uses unique strategy ids
resolves the default strategy id to a registry entry
ranks choose-first-player candidates to choose self first
ranks choose-first-player candidates to choose self first for the current actor
aggressive board-control still chooses itself to go first
builds keep-all, structural, and full mulligan candidates in deterministic order
aggressive board-control keeps the shared mulligan ordering
enumerates resolveBag candidates from the active bag
keeps a resolveBag candidate with empty targets when no valid candidates exist — effect fizzles
enumerates resolveEffect candidates for optional pending effects
enumerates resolveBag candidates for optional look-at-the-top effects
enumerates resolveEffect destinations for look-at-the-top pending effects
emits overflow diagnostics when target pools exceed the search cap
ranks inkwell candidates by lower cost then lower lore
ranks play-card candidates by higher cost then higher lore
enumerates play-card cost modes including standard, shift, sing, and singTogether
enumerates activated abilities with concrete target selections
ranks challenge candidates by preview outcome and defender lore
enumerates move-to-location candidates
resolves the current server actor from pending effects before priority
lets the chosen first-player AI take its mulligan action next
takes automated actions through the player-one surface
takes automated actions through the player-two surface
prefers challenging an exerted high-lore threat when behind on lore
still prefers questing when the available quest reaches 20 lore
lets board-control-lore-race challenge a lore threat before taking a smaller quest
lets board-control-lore-race spend available ink on a simple permanent play
lets aggressive board-control challenge for a clear value trade before questing
lets aggressive board-control take a mutual-banish trade into a higher-value threat
does not let aggressive board-control challenge away an immediate lore win
takes automated actions through the server current-actor surface
resolves look-at-the-top prompts instead of conceding
concedes when automation reaches an unsupported name-card prompt
emits ordered candidate heuristics, selection, and execution attempts to the trace sink
emits fallback decisions to the trace sink when no candidate succeeds
prefers choosing-first-player before pending mulligan and priority
falls back to pending mulligan before priority when no earlier actor exists
prefers the next pending mulligan player once setup has advanced into mulligan
ignores a malformed active pending effect that has no chooser
returns the first successful candidate
retries later candidates after execution failures
falls back to passTurn after three execution failures
falls back to concede when passTurn fails
uses otp-based turn calculation when skip-pre-game fixtures set otp to player one
tracks turn ownership correctly from opening turn zero through subsequent pass turns
projects runtime-filtered follow-up targets for parent-comparison sequences
includes suspended action cards from limbo in projected card snapshots
requires explicit targets for multi-step chosen-target sequences and resolves once all targets are provided
opens a follow-up target prompt after a chosen player selects a branch with card targets
reuses the same cached derived payload across card queries, board projection, and trigger snapshots
computes canBePutInInkwell for legal and illegal v1 cases
returns baseline strength and willpower for characters
derives full name and keyword list from card definition
applies active continuous modifiers to character strength and willpower
returns willpower for locations with valid willpower
applies location willpower modifiers and clamps at zero
returns 0 willpower for locations with missing or invalid willpower
returns 0 strength and willpower for non-character, non-location cards
ignores unrelated non-keyword ability text when resolving bare Shift name targets
keeps SELF-targeted static effects on the source character
resolves hand-active self cost reductions that count characters in play
grants activated abilities from static grant-ability effects to matching characters
matches play triggers with multiple subject card types
queues printed triggered abilities into the bag before they resolve
resolves self-banish printed triggers after the source leaves play
does not let a source trigger on its own move into the inkwell unless the trigger is explicitly self-referential
lets the same player choose among multiple bag effects from one event
enforces once-per-turn triggered restrictions when bag effects resolve
enforces first-time-each-turn restrictions using occurrence tracking
supports printed triggers from discard when sourceZones opt out of play-only defaults
still evaluates discard-sourced printed triggers at start of turn
matches trigger subject keyword queries against temporary keywords
fires during-opponent-turn banish watcher twice when two allies are banished in separate moves
does not queue an end-turn trigger when a comparison condition is false
applies 'their-next-turn' on the target owner's next turn
treats cant-quest-or-challenge as both cant-quest and cant-challenge
keeps until-start-of-next-turn stat modifiers through the next turn
only applies conditioned stat modifiers while the target is challenging a location
moves stat modifiers from old target to new target
retargets multiple effects from the same source
does not retarget effects belonging to other cards
queues end-of-turn delayed triggers instead of resolving them immediately
auto-resolves deterministic end-of-turn delayed triggers before the turn advances
fires next-turn delayed triggers before the controller's draw step
requires explicit targets when a delayed trigger needs a choice and resolves once provided
clears delayed triggers whose target is gone before they resolve
should create a CardId from a string literal
should generate unique IDs when called without arguments
should generate IDs with proper format
should create a PlayerId from a string literal
should generate unique IDs when called without arguments
should generate IDs with proper format
should create a GameId from a string literal
should generate unique IDs when called without arguments
should generate IDs with proper format
should create a ZoneId from a string literal
should generate unique IDs when called without arguments
should generate IDs with proper format
should prevent mixing different ID types at compile time
should allow assignment of branded types to their brand type
should work with arrays and collections
should work with Set and Map
should generate IDs of consistent length
should generate URL-safe IDs
should cast string to CardInstanceId
should cast string to PlayerId
should cast string to ZoneId
should cast string to GameId
asCardInstanceIdOptional should return undefined for empty input
testcase.classname: Optional casting helpers > Safe Casting Helpers

testcase.name: asCardInstanceIdOptional should cast non-empty strings
testcase.classname: Optional casting helpers > Safe Casting Helpers

testcase.name: asPlayerIdOptional should return undefined for empty input

testcase.name: asPlayerIdOptional should cast non-empty strings

testcase.name: asZoneIdOptional should cast non-empty strings
testcase.classname: Optional casting helpers > Safe Casting Helpers

testcase.name: should cast string array to CardInstanceId array
should handle empty arrays
produces different shuffle results for different same-length seeds
remains deterministic for the same seed
resolves runtime card view from static resources + ctx.zones
queryRuntime filters by owner and zones while preserving candidate order
reuses the same runtime card object within one query context
reuses derived payloads across query contexts for the same state+actor and resets on actor/state changes
does not reuse stale runtime card views in write contexts
should not modify state when no time control
should not modify state when clock is not running
should settle chess clock correctly
should allow chess clock to go negative (two-strike timeout)
should settle priority clock within window (no reserve burn)
should settle priority clock with window overage (reserve burn)
should track window timeouts in priority mode
should set priority holder
should clear pass sequence
should start chess clock when granting priority
should open priority window in priority mode
should add player to pass sequence
should clear priority holder
should not duplicate players in pass sequence
should pause clock with reason
should settle elapsed time before pausing
should resume clock for player
should update player timestamp
should award bonus to player
should detect window timeout
should detect reserve timeout
should return null if no timeout
should auto-pass if legal
should forfeit if cannot auto-pass
should end game with loss on time
should return null for no time control
should return chess time summary
should return priority time summary with window
should return null for unknown player
should include timeout info for chess mode
should include timeout info for dynamic mode
should settle dynamic clock correctly
should allow dynamic clock to go negative
should start dynamic clock when granting priority
should award action bonus
should not exceed cap
should add bonus when below cap
should award turn pass bonus
should cap turn pass bonus at reserveCapMs
should return null when player has time remaining
testcase.classname: checkTimeout > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should return 'first' on first timeout (chess)
testcase.classname: checkTimeout > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should return 'second' on second timeout (chess)
testcase.classname: checkTimeout > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should return 'first' on first timeout (dynamic)
testcase.classname: checkTimeout > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should return null for priority mode
testcase.classname: checkTimeout > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should reset chess clock player time after skip
testcase.classname: resetPlayerTimeAfterSkip > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should reset dynamic clock player time after skip
testcase.classname: resetPlayerTimeAfterSkip > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should increment timeout count on second skip
testcase.classname: resetPlayerTimeAfterSkip > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should not modify priority mode
testcase.classname: resetPlayerTimeAfterSkip > Shared Timeout System > Time Control

testcase.name: should create initial context with required fields
should initialize status correctly
should initialize priority correctly
should initialize playerIds from players
should initialize zones correctly
should initialize with no time control
should initialize with chess clock
should initialize with priority clock
should initialize random state
should identify chess clock context
should identify priority clock context
should correctly report clock running state
should report no clock for none mode
should move card between zones
should maintain card metadata when moving
should update zone summaries
should insert at specific index for ordered zones
should move multiple cards at once
should draw cards from deck to hand
should respect player ownership when drawing
should not draw more cards than available
should draw zero cards when count is zero
should draw from the top for owner-scoped zones
should draw specific card from deck
should return false if card not in zone
should mill from top of source zone to destination
should respect owner-scoped filtering when playerId is supplied
should shuffle cards in zone
should shuffle only owned cards for owner-scoped zones
should create reveal window for all
should generate deterministic reveal ids
should create reveal window for specific players
should create reveal with expiration
should reveal top cards of zone
should remove reveal window
should find cards matching predicate
should return limited number of matching cards
should apply predicate if provided
should reveal top cards to specific player
should get card count
should get top card
should get bottom card
should get card zone
should get card owner
should check zone properties
should throw when owner-scoped zone is queried without playerId
should throw when scoped player zone does not exist
should return owner-scoped cards for player-scoped query
should remove expired reveals
should mulligan hand and draw new cards
should fail if no mulligans remaining
returns the zone key for a card in play
returns the zone key for a card in hand
returns undefined for unknown card
returns the owner for a card
returns the correct owner for a card controlled by another player
returns undefined for unknown card
returns the controller for a card
returns different controller than owner when card is controlled by another player
returns undefined for unknown card
should have correct protocol version
should identify UPDATE_ACTION message
should identify SYNC_REQUEST message
should identify UNDO_REQUEST message
should identify UPDATE_PATCH message
should identify UPDATE_FULL message
should identify SYNC_FULL message
should identify ERROR message
should reject non-object values
should validate correct message
should reject null message
should reject message with wrong protocol version
should reject message without matchID
should reject message with invalid matchID type
keeps SYNC_REQUEST synchronous in async mode
keeps SYNC_FULL synchronous in async mode
delays UPDATE_ACTION by one RTT leg
keeps async zero-latency transport off the current call stack
delays UPDATE_FULL, UPDATE_PATCH, and ERROR by one server leg
preserves FIFO ordering for queued same-direction messages
uses full latency for one-way mode
classifies optional no-target effects as optional but not auto-resolvable
classifies optional chosen-target effects as optional and target-requiring
classifies chosen-player effects as requiring explicit target selection
allows explicit empty target selection for up-to chosen targets
classifies put-into-inkwell from hand as requiring explicit target selection
classifies up-to remove-damage as amount-selectable but auto-resolvable
auto-rejects chosen-character effects with no legal candidates
auto-rejects when a mandatory multi-target effect has too few candidates
auto-rejects up-to target effects when there are no candidates to choose
auto-rejects owner-restricted targets when candidates exist only on the wrong side
auto-rejects keyword-filtered targets when no candidate matches the keyword
auto-rejects mixed card-type targets when neither subtype has a legal candidate
auto-rejects discard-from-hand and put-into-inkwell source-card effects with no candidates
treats duplicate-allowed target requirements as satisfiable with one candidate
respects conditional enters-play-exerted static abilities
skips conditional enters-play-exerted when the named character is already in play
emits a localized play card log entry for characters
emits a localized play card log entry for actions before effect resolution continues
allows an exerted character to move to a location
returns CARD_DRYING for characters played this turn
quests all eligible characters with one move
returns NO_ELIGIBLE_QUESTERS when no characters can quest
treats negative lore as 0 for questing while preserving the raw lore value
resolves temporary lore-loss abilities granted for questing
holds challenge damage until declaration-window bag effects auto-resolve
queues banish-in-challenge triggers only after challenge damage is complete
does not scan unrelated discard triggers during the after-challenge window
keeps the challenge open while post-damage bag effects create more post-damage bag effects
does not emit challenged-and-banished when challenge damage is redirected off the defender
treats negative strength as 0 for challenge damage
validates false for players outside runtime playerIds
validates true for valid players during opening phase
sets chosen first player and initializes mulligan state
starts pending mulligan with the chosen first player
validates false for players outside runtime playerIds
validates false when any mulligan card is not in the player's hand
validates true when all selected cards are in hand
validates true for a valid player when cards to mulligan are empty
moves selected cards to the deck and redraws the same number
emits a mixed-visibility mulligan log entry with public count and private detail
draws mulligan replacements from the top of deck
advances priority to the next player after a mulligan
Happy Path
custom matchers should support .not and provide contextual failure messages
should reject chooseFirstPlayer with a player ID outside runtime playerIds
should emit a public first-player-chosen game log entry when chooseFirstPlayer executes
should reject alterHand with a player ID outside runtime playerIds
should choose firstPlayer as OTP and move game to mulligan
should choose secondPlayer as OTP and move game to mulligan
should reject a non-designated player authoritatively and keep state unchanged
should hand mulligan priority to the next player and auto-advance into main
ends the game and emits a concede log entry
allows conceding while a pending effect is waiting on a non-priority chooser
advances turn/priority and emits TURN_STARTED and turnPassed events
updates projected turn ownership after passing from the opening turn
defaults omitted deck fixtures to 10 stub cards
draws a card for the next player at the start of their turn but skips the opening player's first draw
ends the game when the active player passes turn with an empty deck
preserves an explicit empty deck fixture
rejects forced passTurn intent when Reckless challenge is available
keeps passTurn available during enumeration when Reckless is the only blocker
returns CARD_DRYING for exert abilities on drying characters
resolves a named activated ability after the character is dry
fails cleanly when ability lookup misses on a multi-ability card
resolves an activated ability by its titled text prefix when the ability has no explicit name
rejects unmatched selectors on a single-ability card
does not recreate usage meta after a banish-self cost moves the source out of play
forwards banish-character cost selections through the player-scoped activateAbility helper
captures the source location in the banish trigger snapshot for banish-self costs
queues self-banish printed triggers only after a suspended activated ability finishes resolving
validates and resolves chosen-target activated abilities
rejects choosing another opposing character when a do-your-worst character is a legal activated-ability target
resolves named activated abilities with card targets via the scoped helper
rejects invalid activated-ability targets before execution
preserves chosen-for-effect references in activated abilities
surfaces and resolves the temporary activated ability granted by Walk the Plank!
rejects invalid targets and expires the temporary activated ability at turn end
surfaces and resolves a structured temporary activated ability granted by an action
creates a pending activated target selection and skips on resolution when no legal candidates exist
creates a pending target selection when legal activated targets exist
still rejects explicit illegal targets after creating a zero-candidate pending selection
rejects explicit illegal targets for activated abilities even when legal targets exist
does not create a pending target selection for up-to effects with zero legal candidates
keeps optional activated effects pending until resolved, then skips when no legal targets exist
resolves target-attribute in per-target mode
supports filtered-count with excludeSelf and multiplier
supports classification-character-count with excludeSelf
resolves difference and invert semantics
resolves trigger-target-attribute from event snapshot
resolves damage-removed counters from the event snapshot
uses rules-effective 0 for negative strength and lore values
applies clamp bounds
resolves for-each exerted-characters for the controller
evaluates target-query conditions
evaluates target-aggregate-comparison with empty opposing board
evaluates migrated previously-unsupported turn metrics
evaluates first-turn-non-otp condition
evaluates play-context singer count and logical composition
evaluates resource-count conditions for cards in hand
evaluates has-item-count and has-location-count conditions
evaluates if-you-do from the prior effect outcome in the event snapshot
applies dispatcher-resolved per-target amounts for deal-damage
defaults draw amount to 1 when amount is unresolved
mills the top cards of the opponent's deck
mills the chosen player's deck
mills only available cards when the deck is smaller than the amount
applies gain-lore to the controller by default
is a no-op for scry when no amount resolves
applies lose-lore to an opponent and clamps at zero
resolves for-each with damage-on-target counters and maximum cap
lets a later conditional read whether the previous effect resolved
suspends ordered put-on-bottom effects until explicit order is provided
preserves the provided bottom-first order for ordered put-on-bottom effects
suspends name-a-card effects until a name is provided and stores the chosen name
suspends opponent-chosen target effects with an opponent-scoped selection context
does not suspend when repeated chosen descriptors reuse the same selected target
does not suspend later chosen-target consumers when the chosen target lives in prior sequence context
puts chosen hand cards on top of the deck in the provided order
draws for the selected card owner when the effect targets CARD_OWNER
keeps the chosen card context for a later CARD_OWNER step in a sequence
propagates healedAmount through a sequence even when resolution starts without an event snapshot
defaults up-to remove-damage to the maximum legal amount when no amount is provided
preserves an explicit zero amount for up-to remove-damage
keeps if-you-do false when the previous effect has no valid targets
continues to later independent sequence steps when a targeted step has no valid targets
keeps if-you-do false when return-to-hand fails before a play-card continuation
does not auto-play from hand when a follow-up play-card selection is omitted
keeps if-you-do false when the first damage effect deals zero damage
resolves the selected branch when both or branches are legal
forces the only legal or branch when the selected branch is illegal
treats or as a no-op when no branch is legal
preserves the selected top-card order while keeping untouched cards in place
keeps the chosen player's untouched card ahead of the reordered looked-at cards
plays only cards within the frozen chosen-card-cost offset
normalizes string aliases
intersects chosen selected targets with candidate targets
resolves previous-target references to the selected target instead of the source card
counts a repeated chosen target descriptor only once when later steps reuse the same target
resolves trigger-subject references from the event snapshot
resolves trigger-destination references from a move event snapshot
resolves all/each selectors to all candidates
treats negative strength and lore as 0 in target filters
resolves players tied for the highest hand count
resolves only the unique highest hand-count player
skips ranked players when the highest count is below minCount
resolves card query references from source/selected/revealed context
filters discard characters by the named card stored in the event snapshot
filters cards by same-location-as-source and cards-under
evaluates player lore and current-turn filters
enforces target bounds for optional and exact selections
keeps optional zero-target selections empty
accepts explicit empty target input only when the target analysis allows zero selections
still rejects explicit invalid targets even when zero selections would be allowed
fails closed for unknown strict player filters
reduces direct damage by temporary Resist on locations
reduces direct damage by stacked static and temporary Resist
stops reducing damage after the temporary Resist expires
captures the target's location in the banish trigger snapshot for lethal damage
does not apply Resist when damage is put onto a card
resolves string amount 'all' into per-target values
throws for legacy dynamic amount objects
resolves aggregate amount strings from event snapshot
projects aggregate field values across all resolved targets
returns a fixed number of random inkwell cards to the targeted player's hand
trims each player's inkwell independently when configured with leave
resolves ready effects
resolves structured target-query conditions
treats missing current-turn player as an unmet action condition
resolves supported play-card free path
applies play-card card constraints before fallback selection
does not fall back to another discard card when an explicit target has changed zones
batches replayed action play events until every targeted player card is in play
keeps replayed actions out of discard while their resolution is suspended
queues one discard trigger event per discarded card
ignores missing subject cards for CHARACTERS_HERE trigger matching
reveals top cards to all players for reveal-top-card effects
fails closed for unresolved chosen-player targets
propagates chosen-player targets into sequenced reveal-hand and discard effects
does not queue a discard choice when the chosen player's hand has no eligible discard
fails closed for ambiguous return-from-discard without explicit targets
returns selected discard cards when explicit return-from-discard targets are provided
fails closed when explicit return-from-discard targets are invalid
applies temporary cant-quest restrictions
fails fast for unsupported player-targeted restriction effects
clears atLocationId on characters when their location is banished
discards the only valid card when random discard has a single candidate
samples randomly from multiple valid cards instead of always taking the first candidate
resolves CARD_OWNER random discard from the selected card owner
keeps chosen discard semantics ahead of random discard semantics
resolves CARD_OWNER random discard via eventSnapshot.chosenCardId when selectedTargets is empty
